title: Organization Configuration Schema
description: Schema for GitHub organization security configurations

scope.description: Configuration scope (must be 'org' for organization config)

default_member_permission.description: Default permission level for new members

members_can_create_repositories.description: Allow members to create new repositories

members_can_create_internal_repositories.description: Allow members to create internal repositories

members_can_create_private_repositories.description: Allow members to create private repositories

members_can_create_public_repositories.description: Allow members to create public repositories

members_can_fork_private_repositories.description: Allow members to fork private repositories

web_commit_signoff_required.description: Require signed commits via web UI
